text:
was a member of the Dissidence Movement.

Appearance

Juli was a large man who had a dark mustache which grew out to the sides of his head. He had a stern expression on his face, and wore a black vest on top of a white button-up.

Trivia

It is noted by Xavi Inocencio that the leading members of the Dissidence Movement have code names relating to months of the year, with Juli's code name being based on the month of July.
